arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw: Tottenham to face Liverpool as Arsenal meet Newcastle
arts.sum: A pair of blockbuster two-legged all-Premier League ties in the race for Wembley

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw IN FULL as Liverpool and Arsenal discover opponents
arts.sum: Liverpool, Arsenal, Newcastle and Tottenham are all in the hunt for the Carabao Cup as the four teams discover their semi-final opponents ahead of the two-legged affairs

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney sparks 'I can’t comment on that' answer from Celtic mate as dressing room makes return stance clear
arts.sum: Celts boss Brendan Rodgers is understood to be exploring the possibility of a sensational move for the former fan favourite

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup draw LIVE! Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham learn semi-final fate
arts.sum: Spurs on course to join north London rivals in semi-final draw

arts.ttl: When will Carabao Cup semi-final games be played? Tottenham aim to join Arsenal in last-four
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup semi-final draw takes place tonight with Arsenal finding themselves in the hat - despite a scare against London rivals Crystal Palace. London could be represented by two teams in the draw tonight - depending whether or not Tottenham Hotspur can beat Manchester United at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: What Mikel Arteta told Myles Lewis-Skelly as surprise Arsenal star offers behind-the-scenes advice
arts.sum: Especially considering he is playing out of what would be described as his natural position, but he explained that his growth as a midfielder has helped him a lot here. “Well, I just had to mirror Kieran Tierney, be strong in my duels, help the team out defensively and just be secure,” he said.

arts.ttl: 'I would love to see Marcus Rashford at Arsenal' claims former Gunners star
arts.sum: Arsenal could make a ‘real statement of ambition’ and would ‘destroy the opposition’ if they signed Marcus Rashford, according to one of their former stars. 'I would love to see Marcus Rashford at Arsenal' claims former Gunners star

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'make formal offer' to beat Arsenal to Rashford replacement
arts.sum: In spite of the concerns, United feel that finding a top replacement for Rashford is imperative to the operation and Catalan outlet El Nacional report that Nico Williams is considered the ‘perfect profile’ by the club. Although the report claims that United have already submitted a formal offer for Williams, the Premier League giants would be unlikely to push for a move unless an exit route for Rashford is found.

arts.ttl: Stephen Welsh transfer latest as Celtic mull over second offer as Kieran Tierney fills the quota
arts.sum: The Hoops defender is the subject of strong interest from the Belgian Pro League

arts.ttl: England star Bukayo Saka in emotional reunion with his first grassroots coach
arts.sum: The Arsenal winger met up with the man who first coached him age six at local club Greenford Celtic in west London, taking a trip down memory lane
